title: Ethiopian Red Lentil Stew (Misir Wot)
description: A classic Ethiopian dish made with red lentils, onions, and spices. This stew is flavorful and nutritious, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add ginger powder, berbere spice, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add red lentils and 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until lentils are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or parsley, if desired.
